{{Quote|You Imperials killed my sister! You all deserve to die for that!|Haro Whitesun|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Haro Whitesun''' was the [[Whitesun family|brother]] of [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun Lars]] and [[Dama Whitesun Brunk]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] for supporting the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in their fight against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:MercenaryTemplateHumanMale.jpg|250px|thumb|Possible Human male depictions of Haro Whitesun]]
[[File:MercenaryTemplateNoHumanMale.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Randomly generated depictions of Haro Whitesun, deemed non-canon in the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity]]
Haro Whitesun was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. Due to the nature of many older quests in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the gender and appearance of Haro changed each time a player performed this quest. However, the quest dialogue indicated that Haro Whitesun was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], given his relationship to [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun Lars]].
